updates.tweet_text:
No volatility summer range trading continues in #ES_F: 95% holding a runner, then every 1-3 days we get a trap down which we buy via Failed Breakdown. Last was the 7490 Reclaim Sunday.

Today's targets are 7522 (hit), 7532, 7548 (big res), then the 7575 major backtest zone https://t.co/4XK8bkqvTu
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7522, 7532, 7548, 7575) are either morning-plan levels or observations of targets already hit; no new actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text: Note: 7506 was today's support given in morning post at 8am, and it held exact. Just ride your runner
updates.notes: 7506 is a morning-plan level (reaffirmation). 'Ride your runner' is trade management. No new actionable levels named.

Nothing to do now. Ride your runner in #ES_F https://t.co/4XK8bkqvTu
